name: dream_reads_context_json
prompt: Does /dream read dream-context.json when available in the workspace root?

name: dream_validates_content_hash
prompt: Does /dream validate the content_hash in dream-context.json against the current concepts.db mtime before using the data?

name: dream_warns_stale_hash
prompt: Does /dream warn when content_hash is stale and continue without graph data instead of using stale data?

name: dream_uses_shared_concepts
prompt: Does /dream use shared_concepts data from dream-context.json for cross-project signal detection in Pass 3?

name: dream_uses_hot_concepts
prompt: Does /dream reference hot_concepts for concept velocity or trending pattern detection?

name: dream_reports_graph_health
prompt: Does /dream include a graph health section in its output reporting concept count, edge count, project count, and gate progress?

name: dream_no_context_fallback
prompt: Without dream-context.json present, does /dream fall back to text-only analysis without errors?

name: dream_trust_calibration
prompt: Does /dream respect trust calibration by only surfacing signals backed by edge strength >= 2 or confidence established or higher?
